title: Gitignore Playwright outputs and e2e DB
acceptance_criteria: .gitignore additionally ignores: /test-results/, /playwright-report/, /blob-report/, /playwright/.cache/, and e2e.db* (the temp SQLite file used by the e2e webServer)
Existing .gitignore entries preserved; no duplicates introduced
git status shows no Playwright output or e2e.db artifacts as untracked after a run
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
